name: Canopy Registry
description: Canopy product registration prototype built with Gemini.

name: RID Label Wizard
description: Barcode generation and label printing workflow for cannabis package compliance. Generate-first flow with template/reel configuration and multi-format download.
openQuestions: V3: How should inline field overrides surface corrections upstream?
Should operators be able to regenerate barcodes after initial generation?
Large batch threshold — is 5,000 the right cutoff for phased progress?

versions.label: V2 — Generate First
versions.description: Generate barcodes first, then configure print

versions.label: V3 — Override Flow
versions.description: V2 + inline field overrides for upstream corrections (planned)

name: QR Product Verify
description: Consumer-facing product verification page accessed via QR code scan.
openQuestions: Should the CoA link open a real PDF viewer or redirect to the lab's website?
Should there be a 'Report a problem' link for suspected counterfeit products?
How does the QR URL schema work? (e.g., verify.metrc.com/p/{packageTag})

name: Product Search
description: Interactive product search flow with results, selection, and detail view.
openQuestions: Should search results be paginated or infinite scroll?

name: RID Landing Page
description: Consumer-facing Retail ID mobile landing page exploring 4 GTM use cases: compliance-first, compliance+brand, brand-forward, and brand-only.
openQuestions: How does the state seal/logo get uploaded?
Should the campaign banner be dismissible by the consumer?
Which warning messages are required by MA regulation vs. configurable?

prompts.text: Create another version of qr-verify prototype taking Urban Consultants Confluence context into consideration. Need brand-primary, brand-secondary, no-compliance/brand-only options. Research if some states don't need compliance. Use MA, generate fictitious product image.

links.label: Confluence: Mobile Landing Page Discussion with Urban + Consultants

prompts.text: Replace the legal banners on top of the page with a CCC + Compliance Passed + Metrc Retail ID branded banner image.

Remove V1 and replace with V2. Add new V2 with accordion sections (like About Brand). Start V2 on UC2. Add full-width View Full COA button above the accordion. All Tests Passed badge inline under accordion title.

context.summary: Explores the consumer-facing mobile landing page for Retail ID across different state adoption models, based on Urban consultant feedback emphasizing compliance-first positioning and state configurability.

documents.label: Confluence: Mobile Landing Page Discussion with Urban + Consultants
Confluence: Mobile Landing Pages Ideas and Feedback

context.notes: The 'two flavors' GTM model (mandated vs. non-mandated) from the 2026 Roadmap directly informed the 4 use cases.

name: Transfer Manifest
description: Detail view for cannabis product transfer manifests.
openQuestions: Should there be a list/index view for all manifests?

name: RID Tag Generator
description: Guided step-by-step wizard for operators to generate QR-coded tags: select template, configure quantities/reels, generate, and download CSV/PDF.
openQuestions: Should the Learn more link on migrated templates go to a Pendo guide or Confluence doc?
Can the migrated template banner be removed after a couple months?
What are the maximum tags per reel?
Should regulators have a batch approve action?
How long does QR code generation actually take?

prompts.text: Build a RID tag generation wizard — step-by-step flow where operators configure a template, enter quantities, calculate reels, generate QR codes, and download CSV/PDF. Based on meeting transcript with Ryan Andrews, Grant Kemp, and Tanika Tompkins.

versions.label: v1
versions.description: Initial wizard flow from March 2026 meeting with Ryan Andrews, Grant Kemp, and Tanika Tompkins

context.summary: Guided step-by-step wizard for RID tag generation. Operators select templates, configure quantity and reels, generate QR codes with unique IDs, and download CSV (always) + PDF (optional). Regulators get a separate order review view.
context.notes: Ryan Andrews excited about guided step-by-step approach. Grant Kemp noted Learn more link environment issue. Changed print to download per Lana's decision. Migrated template banner planned for eventual removal.
